G

generateCurrentShoppingList(RecipeManager, Scanner) - Static method in class assn3.Assignment3
Generates and prints the current shopping list, then asks if the user wants to save it.
generateCurrentShoppingList(RecipeManager, Scanner) - Static method in class assn3.RecipeManagerTest
Generates and prints the current shopping list, then asks if the user wants to save it.
generateShoppingListFile(Scanner) - Method in class assn3.RecipeManager
Generates a shopping list file if the user decides to save it.
getIngredient() - Method in class assn3.Recipe
Retrieves the map of ingredients for this recipe.
getMenu() - Method in class assn3.RecipeManager
Retrieves the menu of available recipes.
getOrderedQuantity() - Method in class assn3.Recipe
Gets the quantity of this recipe that has been ordered.
getRecipeName() - Method in class assn3.Recipe
Gets the name of the recipe.
getRecipeOrder() - Method in class assn3.RecipeManager
Retrieves the list of ordered recipes.
